objective: Validate that a client can successfully create a booking with duo allocation from available roster slots

seedData.description: Client user with verified email and no existing non-terminal bookings
Active venue with valid operating hours
Two available roster slots for captain and vice captain at target venue/time (2-hour window)

payloadRules.startAt: Future ISO-8601 timestamp matching available roster slots (2-hour window expected)

steps.layman: Client requests a booking by providing venue and start time

expectedBehavior: Check client has no non-terminal bookings
steps.layman: System validates the client is eligible and calculates the 2-hour booking window

expectedBehavior: Find one CAPTAIN with available roster slot for [startAt, endAt)
Find one VICE_CAPTAIN with available roster slot for [startAt, endAt)
Lock both roster slots using FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
steps.layman: System allocates a duo (captain + vice captain) from available roster

expectedBehavior: Generate qrCode, pinCode, comMatchQrCode, comMatchPinCode, bookingColor
Mark 2 roster slots as BOOKED with booking_id reference
Create 2 booking_companion_assignments (CAPTAIN + VICE_CAPTAIN) with default statuses
steps.layman: System creates the booking, reserves slots, and assigns the duo atomically
System returns the confirmed booking with booking ID and details
Verify booking exists in database with all required artifacts generated
Verify exactly 2 roster slots are marked as BOOKED for this booking
Verify duo assignments exist with correct designations and default match statuses

db: Exactly 2 companion assignments created (1 CAPTAIN, 1 VICE_CAPTAIN)
All booking artifacts (qrCode, pinCode, etc.) are generated
businessRules: Client has no other non-terminal bookings
Duo integrity: one CAPTAIN + one VICE_CAPTAIN
Roster slots reserved for exact 2-hour window

notes: This is the primary happy path for booking creation
Validates atomic transaction: booking + roster + assignments
